description: Generates Stratified K-Fold cross validation splits for a classification target.

interface.entrypoint: get_splits(X, y, n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=42) -> splits

known_pitfalls: Only suitable for classification targets where stratification is possible.
Regression targets must be binned first if stratification is desired.
